element.hint: Show background grid lines for easier value reading
element.label: Show Grid Lines
element.name: grid_show

element.hint: Corner radius for the top of each bar in pixels
element.label: Bar Corner Radius
element.name: bar_radius

element.hint: Render bars horizontally instead of vertically
element.label: Horizontal Bars
element.name: horizontal

element.hint: Apply a 3D perspective effect to column bars
element.label: 3D Columns
element.name: bar_3d

element.hint: Display the numeric value above or inside each bar
element.label: Show Values on Bars
element.name: show_values

element.hint: Custom label text displayed beside the Y-axis
element.label: Y-Axis Label
element.name: y_axis_label

element.hint: Proportional gap between bars (0-1, where 0.2 means 20% gap)
element.label: Bar Gap
element.name: bar_gap

element.hint: Custom label text displayed below the X-axis
element.label: X-Axis Label
element.name: x_axis_label

element.hint: Stack bars on top of each other instead of side by side for grouped data
element.label: Stacked
element.name: stacked

element.hint: Minimum height in pixels for bars with very small values
element.label: Minimum bar height
element.name: min_bar_height
